task_completion.description: Verify the location is set to 15.00°N, 145.00°W and altitude 0m.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Stellarium Location window or bottom status bar shows latitude near 15°00' N, longitude near 145°00' W, and elevation/altitude 0m.

task_completion.description: Verify the date and time are set to December 15, 2023, at 22:30 UTC.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Stellarium Date/Time window or bottom status bar shows the date as 2023-12-15 and time as 22:30 (or equivalent local time).

task_completion.description: Verify the display settings match the requirements.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The azimuthal grid (circular and radial lines) and star labels are visible in the sky view. The atmosphere is disabled (sky is dark/black even if the sun is up), and no constellation lines or artwork are visible.

task_completion.description: Verify that screenshots of the four specified stars were taken and saved to the Desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent centers the view on Polaris, Sirius, Canopus, and Vega, and saves screenshots. Image files for these stars should be visible on the Desktop or in a file manager.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation and content of nav_log.txt.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text file named nav_log.txt is created on the Desktop. When open in a text editor or terminal, it contains the names Polaris, Sirius, Canopus, Vega, the date (Dec 15, 2023), and the position (15°N, 145°W).

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the Stellarium GUI to configure the simulation.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent clicks through Stellarium menus, location window, and date/time window rather than just editing configuration files via terminal.

integrity.description: Verify the screenshots are genuinely taken from the configured Stellarium instance.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the Stellarium interface or the exact sky view with the requested azimuthal grid and disabled atmosphere, not generic images from the web.

integrity.description: Verify the nav_log.txt was created by the agent.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent uses a text editor (like gedit or nano) or terminal commands to write the specific required information into nav_log.txt.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Location: 15.00°N, 145.00°W, altitude 0m. Target Date/Time: 2023-12-15 22:30:00 UTC. Required Stars: Polaris, Sirius, Canopus, Vega. Required Display Flags: Azimuthal grid ON, Star names ON, Atmosphere OFF, Constellation lines OFF, Constellation art OFF. Note: 145.00°W is in the Eastern Pacific, and 22:30 UTC corresponds to midday locally, so the sun may be up, but with the atmosphere disabled, the sky will appear dark and stars will be visible.
